title: Terms & Privacy
description: The site is a platform where users can publish their creative work (Games, Images, Music, etc.), rate and comment on other users' creations, and create their own contests (Jams).
age: By using the site, you confirm that you are 18+ and agree to these terms.

first.title: General Terms
items: All content you upload is created by you, and you bear full responsibility for it.
Administration is not obligated to pre-screen materials, but may remove them and restrict account access for rule violations.
We may remove your content or restrict access to the site at any time without notice if site rules or applicable laws are violated.

second.title: Prohibited Content and Actions
second.description: The following content and activities are prohibited on the site:
items: Insults, threats, harassment, discrimination, and hate speech;
Materials that infringe copyright and related rights;
Malicious files, links, viruses, exploits, and other software capable of harming other users;
Publication of third-party personal data without their consent;

third.title: Privacy
third.subtitle: We process the minimum amount of data necessary for the site to function.

privacy: Data is used for site functionality and security.
delete: Data deletion is available self-service through profile settings or upon request by emailing support@ioy.app.
